check: External calibration RECALIBRATION test (turn iter4 negative into scoped positive-or-not)
claim_under_test: Frozen Marson T1D conformal quantiles do NOT transfer cross-assay (iter4 HONEST NEGATIVE: 80/90/95 -> 4.8/7.6/17.1 on Norman K562). BUT if we RE-CALIBRATE conformal quantiles on Norman's OWN calibration split (same split-conformal method, new data), empirical coverage on a held-out Norman test split should be restored to near-nominal -- showing the METHOD generalizes even though the specific frozen quantiles do not.
external_dataset: Norman et al. 2019 K562 Perturb-seq (GSE133344); 105 single-gene perturbations, 11855 NegCtrl control cells; group stats in data/interim/norman_group_stats.npz.
exchangeable_units: 105 single-gene perturbations (each >=25 cells, already filtered by iter4).
target_definition: y = log1p( L2norm( Welch DE zscore over 9780-gene shared readout panel, on-target gene excluded ) ) -- IDENTICAL to Marson conformal.py; reproduces iter4 frozen residual mean/sd 0.604/0.295 and frozen coverage 0.048/0.076/0.171 EXACTLY (verified before this prereg).
base_predictor_PRIMARY: FRESH HistGradientBoostingRegressor (max_iter=300, lr=0.05, max_depth=4, l2=1.0, random_state=SEED) fit on Norman CALIBRATION split only. Full method re-applied to new data.
conformal_quantile_rule: q = np.quantile(calib_abs_residual, L, method='higher') -- byte-identical call to conformal.py.
coverage_metric: fraction of held-out Norman TEST perturbations with |y-pred| <= q, per level.
sensitivity_frozen_base: variant keeping the frozen near-constant Marson base predictor and recalibrating ONLY the quantiles on Norman calib residuals -- isolates the conformal step from base-predictor refit.
PREREGISTERED_success_criterion: method_generalizes = 'yes' iff the mean-across-splits recalibrated coverage at ALL THREE levels lands within +/-0.05 of nominal (0.75-0.85 / 0.85-0.95 / 0.90-1.00); 'partial' if some-but-not-all levels within band OR within +/-0.08; 'no' if it fails the band at multiple levels even after recalibration. Chosen BEFORE scoring; no tuning to cross it.
honesty_note: If recalibration does NOT restore coverage, that is reported as a DEEPER (scale) problem, not reframed.
